word: H2404 - חָטַב - châṭab - khaw-tab' - Cut down

sections.paragraph:
Original: חטב

Transliteration: châṭab

Phonetic: khaw-tab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut, gather
    1. (Qal) to cut, gather (wood)
    2. (Pual) to cut, carve

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 639

Part(s) of speech: Verb
